title: Nextor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Nextor.png|thumb|right|150px|Nextor]]
'''Nextor''' was a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] occasionally used in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] construction. The crystal was [[Mining/Legends|mined]] in the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]].

When set in a lightsaber's crystal chamber, nextor generated a highly volatile, yet powerful blade.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Strongholds]]''
